creator: paulius@devnull.lt
text:
After upgrade to XOrg 7.2, the x11/e17-module-language doesn't work as expected 
(and as before).
It compiles, but doesn't show/support any languages.
configure shows:
checking X11/extensions/XKBrules.h usability... no
checking X11/extensions/XKBrules.h presence... yes
configure: WARNING: X11/extensions/XKBrules.h: present but cannot be compiled
configure: WARNING: X11/extensions/XKBrules.h:     check for missing prerequisite headers?
configure: WARNING: X11/extensions/XKBrules.h: see the Autoconf documentation
configure: WARNING: X11/extensions/XKBrules.h:     section "Present But Cannot Be Compiled"
configure: WARNING: X11/extensions/XKBrules.h: proceeding with the preprocessor's result
configure: WARNING: X11/extensions/XKBrules.h: in the future, the compiler will take precedence
checking for X11/extensions/XKBrules.h... yes
configure: creating ./config.status

How-To-Repeat: Try to compile port or install binary package for -STABLE, enable it in e17 and 
try to use it.
